title: Calendar Day Optionality for Recurring Tasks
excerpt: For recurring tasks, you can select when they appear on your board, however, you cannot prefill a due date based on Calendar day. This is frustrating when you have recurring tasks with the same due dates each time.

posts.author: faithrosenwald (Faith Rosenwald)
posts.cookedHtml: For recurring tasks, you can select when they appear on your board, however, you cannot prefill a due date based on Calendar day. This is frustrating when you have recurring tasks with the same due dates each time.
